case_title: CHIA LIN TSAI VS. RICO TRIAS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED OCT-18-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRIAS, RICO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO PROVIDE INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHIA LIN TSAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICO TRIAS IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2340 TO THE PLAINTIFF, TO BE MADE IN TWO PAYMENTS $1170. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS MADE TODAY. THE SECOND PAYMENT IS DUE BY FEB-10-2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-22ND HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY TSAI, CHIA LIN (ELAINE TSAI) AS TO DEFENDANT TRIAS, RICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2021 - CONTINUED FOR MANDARIN INTERPRETER TO JAN-10-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHIA LIN TSAI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFED MANDARIN INTERPRETER KIM LAM LU, FRIEND INTERPRETERS OATH ADMINISTERED. DEFENDANT IS RICO TRIAS PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS IT NECCESARY TO HAVE COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
